items.topic_thesis: Rectification of Names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.
items.angle: Do not summarize the news; diagnose the pattern underneath it.
items.hook: Most people are misreading what this story is actually about. rectification of names matters because a leader who cannot call failure failure makes ritual truth-telling a farce.

items.topic_thesis: Severability and reversibility make criticism cheaper and therefore more honest.
items.angle: Start with a recurring problem and end with a usable move.
items.hook: If your team keeps repeating the same failure, stop adding process. severability and reversibility make criticism cheaper and therefore more honest.

items.topic_thesis: Run Time and Ritual Time require different forms of accountability.
items.angle: Name the concept, explain it plainly, and show why it matters now.
items.hook: The mistake leaders keep making is thinking run time and ritual time require different forms of accountability.

items.topic_thesis: The Alchemy of Error is the practical art of turning disruption into better structure.
items.angle: Make the pattern recognizable fast and show what drives it.
items.hook: You can tell a team is drifting into theater when the alchemy of error is the practical art of turning disruption into better structure.

items.topic_thesis: Knowledge and myth solve different problems, and organizations fail when they confuse them.
items.angle: The old source is not the point; present relevance is.
items.hook: An old idea becomes useful again when the present gets confusing. knowledge and myth solve different problems, and organizations fail when they confuse them.
